field_notes.key: The official packet uses Identifier for the cookie key.
field_notes.payload_hex: The official packet uses a nullable payload encoded through ClientboundStoreCookiePacket.PAYLOAD_STREAM_CODEC; this fixture uses the non-null branch.

stop_boundary: Proves Login serverbound cookie_response packet framing and dispatch/decode for one non-null payload fixture only; do not infer cookie storage policy, request/response runtime behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
